title: nepeta × faassenii
intro: Nepeta × faassenii, also known as catmint, is a hybrid plant species within the Nepeta genus, native to Europe and Western Asia. This perennial herb has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional herbal medicine, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it effective against various ailments such as fever, digestive issues, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Nepeta × faassenii include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, Nepeta × faassenii can be used as a tea, tincture, or essential oil, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
